summary.intent: Address PR review comments on #509 by replacing a process-wide static AtomicBool with an Arc<AtomicBool> to avoid shared state across parallel tests.
summary.outcome: The static AtomicBool in crates/provider-setup/src/lib.rs was refactored to use Arc<AtomicBool>, the fix was formatted, tested, and committed to the PR branch.

repo: The fix for issue #502 (timeout) was already on main via commits 67d6af6a and da754584; PR #509 added only regression tests.

code.finding: Used a process-wide static AtomicBool which is unsafe for parallel test execution; should be Arc<AtomicBool> scoped per test instance.

workflow: PR review comments were fetched via gh CLI and addressed in a single edit+commit cycle.
Conversations on the PR are expected to be resolved after pushing the fix.

friction: The regression test PR (#509) introduced a shared static state bug that was caught only in code review, not during initial test authoring.
open_items: Confirm all PR conversations on #509 are marked resolved after the fix is pushed.
Verify the Closes #502 auto-close fires correctly on merge.
